name: Koosa (Stuffed Squash) Lebanese Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut stems and scoop out seeds of squash, then wash.
2. STUFFING: Mix rice, ground lamb, and all spices together in a bowl.
3. Stuff the prepared squash with the mixture; do not pack tightly.
4. Arrange the stuffed squash in a pan.
5. Add tomatoes, tomato sauce, salt, and pepper over the squash.
6. Pour enough water into the pan to cover the squash, then bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 25 minutes.
8. The same stuffing can be used for green peppers and small eggplants.
